headings.description: Used for all main headings (H1-H3). Adds authority and elegance.

body.description: Clean, highly readable humanist sans-serif for long texts and UI elements.

accent.description: Used for buttons, navigation, and small labels (uppercase).

primary.description: Deep Navy Blue. Represents trust, institutional solidity, and seriousness.

secondary.description: Metallic Gold/Bronze. Used sparingly for borders, active states, and icons. Premium accent.

background.description: Warm off-white/alabaster base. Avoids sterile blue-whites. Feels like premium stationery.

images.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay

images.alt: Modern cable stayed bridge in Biobio region
images.usage: About Us section or Location contact card

layout_strategies.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) for Services. High Density for Information.
layout_strategies.header_style: Sticky with backdrop-blur-md. White background on scroll, transparent on Hero (if readable).
layout_strategies.footer_style: Dark Navy background (#0A192F) with Gold accents.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3A5F] rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0A192F] text-[#0A192F] hover:bg-[#0A192F] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300
buttons.accent: bg-[#C5A059] text-white hover:bg-[#D4B475] rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 border-t-4 border-[#C5A059] shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer

forms.input: bg-transparent border-b border-[#0A192F]/20 focus:border-[#C5A059] focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-gray-400 transition-colors

elements: Background Image: hero_bg with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60)
Headline: 'Defensa Jurídica de Excelencia en Concepción' (H1, Playfair, White)
Subheadline: 'Trayectoria, confianza y resultados desde 1982.' (Lato, Gray-200)
Trust Bar: 'Más de 40 años de experiencia' | 'Atención Personalizada' | 'Ubicación Estratégica'
Split layout: Text Left / Image Right (about_location)
Content: Focus on local expertise in Biobío and personalized attention.
Each card has a specific icon and list of sub-services (Divorce, Dismissal, Contracts)
Grid of Lawyer profiles (Image + Name + Specialty)
Focus on successful outcomes (anonymized if needed)
Two columns: Form Left / Info + Map Right
Form fields: Name, Email, Phone, Case Type, Message

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add Playfair Display and Lato via Google Fonts in index.css.
CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (navy, gold, alabaster).
USE SHADCN: Use Accordion, Sheet (mobile menu), Dialog (modals if needed). customize them to remove rounded corners (set radius to 0 or sm).
NO ROUNDED CORNERS: Aim for sharp, professional edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max) to convey seriousness.
MOBILE FIRST: Ensure padding is massive on desktop but appropriate on mobile.
NAVIGATION: Create a transparent-to-solid sticky header transition.
IMAGES: Use the provided URLs. Do not use placeholders.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Use 2x more whitespace than you think is necessary.
Micro-interactions on all buttons and links (underline expansion, color shift).
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (Gold on White needs careful checking, use darker Gold #A3823A for text).
